summary:
The patient has symptoms related to advanced cancer including severe nausea/vomiting/mental changes along with high blood calcium; starting by giving IV fluid therapy addresses both hydration needs and begins managing elevated calcium immediately. \boxed{IV Fluids}

The rationale focuses directly on addressing core issues like symptom control through rehydration which helps manage multiple aspects such as electrolyte imbalance contributing to neurological signs alongside direct treatment for hypercalcaemic crisis via volume expansion. This aligns closely but concisely captures essential elements needed from an answer regarding prompt intervention strategies appropriate given presented scenario details without extraneous information or assumptions not supported clinically here.
